description_long: This house features a single-story, modern rectangular layout with clean, white exterior walls and large floor-to-ceiling windows along the front and side facades. The structure includes multiple rooms, visible through the open roof and transparent window sections, and a prominent entryway with a door and adjacent windows. The front of the house is defined by a wide walkway or driveway leading up to the main entrance, while the rear and sides are more enclosed with fewer windows. The roof is flat, consistent with contemporary architectural styles, and the interior appears to be divided into functional living spaces, including a kitchen, bedrooms, and bathrooms. The use of glass and open spaces suggests an emphasis on natural light and modern living. The overall design is minimalistic, with a focus on geometric forms and practical layout.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white exterior, and large floor-to-ceiling windows at the front. The layout is open and minimalistic, emphasizing natural light and clean lines.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, and a wide walkway leading to the door.
description_view_1: Rear view with fewer windows, more enclosed walls, and a glimpse of interior room divisions.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the extensive glass facade and the open-plan interior layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with additional large windows and the continuation of the walkway along the front.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, flanked by large glass panels and accessed via a wide walkway; minimalistic with no porch or decorative columns.
